_comment: 神圣铠甲 — 下界合金胸甲，Protection X + 自定义属性 + 多行Lore，需下界/末地炉灶 + 高燃

result.nbt: {display:{Name:'{"text":"天界护甲","color":"light_purple","bold":true,"italic":false}',Lore:['{"text":"由末影龙之力淬炼","color":"dark_purple","italic":false}','{"text":"坚不可摧，永世长存","color":"gray","italic":false}','{"text":"防御 +30 / 韧性 +15 / 击退 100%","color":"aqua","italic":false}','{"text":"[ 神圣·传世之作 ]","color":"dark_gray","italic":false}']},Enchantments:[{id:"minecraft:protection",lvl:10s},{id:"minecraft:unbreaking",lvl:5s},{id:"minecraft:mending",lvl:1s},{id:"minecraft:thorns",lvl:3s},{id:"minecraft:blast_protection",lvl:4s}],AttributeModifiers:[{AttributeName:"generic.armor",Name:"generic.armor",Amount:30.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-2000001,0,0,1],Slot:"chest"},{AttributeName:"generic.armor_toughness",Name:"generic.armor_toughness",Amount:15.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-2000002,0,0,2],Slot:"chest"},{AttributeName:"generic.knockback_resistance",Name:"generic.knockback_resistance",Amount:1.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-2000003,0,0,3],Slot:"chest"},{AttributeName:"generic.max_health",Name:"generic.max_health",Amount:20.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-2000004,0,0,4],Slot:"chest"}]}

jei_description: §d需要下界炉灶或末地炉灶 + 高燃 + 80点热量消耗。
§7防具属性：§c防御 +30 §7/ §e韧性 +15 §7/ §b击退抗性 100%§7 / §a最大生命 +20❤
§7附魔：保护X·耐久V·经验修补·荆棘III·爆炸保护IV
§7取出时获得：抗性IV·生命恢复III·吸收V（30秒）
